query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "redesign mixture-of-experts routers with manifold power iteration" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the same core mechanism (Mixture-of-Experts architecture in LLMs) and measures the same dependent variables (model performance and efficiency) as the user's question, even though it focuses on expert pruning rather than router redesign. It provides essential context on MoE optimization strategies that a literature review on extending MoE routers would need to cite to establish the current state of the art in MoE efficiency.
